flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Saint Mary rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($31.6k → $35.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Saint Mary rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($31.6k → $35.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at University of Saint Mary vs the 2018–2022 baseline (44.1% vs 49.7%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Saint Mary fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).
